name: Update Entity NBT
desc: Updates the NBT data of an entity (used for command block minecarts, spawned entities with custom NBT).

implementation.overview: S49 updates a single entity's NBT data. Sent for command block minecarts, falling blocks with custom data, and other NBT-holding entities. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S49PacketUpdateEntityNBT)
modules.purpose: Server sends S49PacketUpdateEntityNBT to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
